hero_subtitle: SFTY helps exchange executives organize and preserve audit-ready evidence across compliance workflows to support bank due diligence with clear, provider-neutral operational visibility.

problem_title: Bank due diligence slows without structured evidence
problem_description: Executives at digital asset exchanges face challenges compiling clear and consistent evidence for bank reviews. Disconnected compliance data and fragmented workflows make audit readiness and risk oversight harder to maintain and explain.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects compliance workflows, evidence packages, provider outputs and case histories into a unified operating layer that supports structured bank due diligence and executive risk oversight.
workflow_title: From provider checks to due diligence evidence
workflow_description: SFTY organizes exchange compliance checks into structured cases that collect review evidence and prepare comprehensive packages for bank due diligence.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented evidence. Review-ready bank due diligence
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented compliance outputs into structured evidence and decisions, giving exchange executives clear operational visibility and audit-ready support for bank due diligence reviews.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports exchange executives by structuring provider outputs, preserving audit evidence, and enabling scalable deployment for defensible bank due diligence workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for exchange executives?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides exchange executives with a connected compliance control layer, offering clear visibility into compliance workflows, risk exposures, and evidence to support operational risk management and oversight.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support bank due diligence?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures and organizes due diligence evidence into comprehensive, reviewable packages, linking customer profiles, transaction risk, onboarding data and case histories to simplify bank relationship reviews.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and provider outputs with evidence-grade audit trails, supporting compliance teams maintain a defensible and transparent record for regulatory and banking reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY connects seamlessly with existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers to connect their outputs into a structured compliance workflow without replacing current tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace compliance providers; it operates as a neutral layer that turns multiple provider outputs into structured workflows, audit evidence and managerial insights.
final_title: Organize evidence for exchange bank due diligence
final_description: Review how SFTY helps structure and preserve audit-ready compliance evidence for clear executive risk oversight.
